metadata.description: Kanban board for Customer Portal with Authentication. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task. Broken-down subtasks should be added based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md

tasks.title: Customer Portal with Authentication
tasks.description: Create web-based customer portal where customers can log in to manage their wishlists, view purchase history, and account information.
tasks.userStory: As a customer, I want to log in to a customer portal so that I can securely access my wishlist and account information.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a customer visits the portal, when they want to log in, then they can authenticate using email/password or social login
Given customer authentication, when logged in, then they can access their wishlist, purchase history, and account settings
Given customer portal, when customer views purchase history, then they see all past purchases with details and dates
Given customer account, when customer updates profile information, then changes are saved and reflected in store's customer database
Given customer authentication, when session expires, then customer is prompted to log in again
Given customer portal security, when accessed, then all data is isolated to the customer's account (no access to other customers' data)
tasks.businessValue: Enables customer self-service and wishlist management. Required for automated wishlist notifications.
tasks.technicalNotes: Create separate customer authentication system (can use Azure AD B2C with separate tenant or custom auth). Build customer-facing React app. Ensure data isolation between customers and stores.
successMetrics: Customer portal adoption: 40%+ of customers create portal accounts
Portal login rate: 30%+ of registered customers log in monthly
businessRules: Customer portal requires separate authentication from store employee system
Customers can only access their own data
Customer accounts are linked to store customer profiles
Portal supports email/password and optional social login
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks should be broken down into 1-2 day units based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md
